## 🚀 QUICK START - Send Emails TODAY

### Step 1: Update Sender Info (REQUIRED)

```bash
nano ~/.openclaw/sender_info.json
```

**Update with YOUR details:**
```json
{
  "name": "Your Real Name",
  "email": "tigha66@gmail.com",
  "phone": "+44 7XXX XXXXXX",
  "address": "Your Full Address, City, Postcode, UK",
  "company": "Your Web Services"
}
```

⚠️ **Your physical address is REQUIRED by law (CAN-SPAM/GDPR)**

### Step 2: Test Send (Dry Run)

```bash
cd /home/admin/.openclaw/workspace/skills/business-lead-gen/scripts
python3 send_emails.py --input batches-uk/proposals-London-Restaurants-UK-20260316.csv --dry-run
```

### Step 3: Send First Batch (20 emails)

```bash
python3 send_emails.py --input batches-uk/proposals-London-Restaurants-UK-20260316.csv --limit 20 --delay 60
```

### Step 4: Monitor & Follow Up

- Watch for replies in your Gmail inbox
- Track bounces (invalid emails)
- Follow up after 3-4 days with non-responders

## 📞 Call Script (For Phone Outreach)

```
"Hi, this is [Your Name]. I'm a local web developer and I noticed 
[Business Name] doesn't have a website yet. 

I help businesses like yours get found on Google and attract more customers.
One new customer usually pays for the whole website.

Would you be open to a quick chat about how a website could help 
[Business Name] get more customers?"
```

### Objection Handlers

**"Too expensive"**
→ "One new customer pays for the whole website. How much is a typical job worth to you?"

**"Don't need a website"**
→ "Where do your customers find you? Most people search Google first. If you're not there, they call your competitor."

**"Too busy"**
→ "Perfect! That means business is good. A website helps you get even more customers without extra work. I handle everything."

**"Let me think about it"**
→ "Totally understand. I'll email you my info with examples. Take your time."

## 📧 Email Template Preview

**Subject:** Your New Professional Website – Enhance [Business Name] Today

**Body:**
```
Hi [Business Name] team,

I noticed that [Business Name] is thriving in [Location], but your online 
presence could be even better. I'm offering a one-time solution to create 
a stunning, fully functional website for your business.

What you'll get:
✓ Professional, mobile-friendly design
✓ Contact form & Google Maps integration
✓ Fast loading & SEO optimized
✓ One-week delivery

One-time fee: £397 (no monthly fees)
Optional maintenance: £39/month

See example: https://tigha66.github.io/plumber-website/

Interested? Reply to this email or call me at [Your Phone]

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Company]
[Your Phone]
[Your Address - REQUIRED]
```

## 🛠️ Useful Commands

```bash
# Count total leads
cd /home/admin/.openclaw/workspace/skills/business-lead-gen/scripts/batches-uk
wc -l leads-*.csv | tail -1

# View first 10 leads from a batch
head -11 leads-London-Restaurants-UK-20260316.csv

# Send emails (limit 20, 60s delay)
python3 send_emails.py --input batches-uk/proposals-London-Restaurants-UK-20260316.csv --limit 20 --delay 60

# Dry run (test without sending)
python3 send_emails.py --input batches-uk/proposals-London-Restaurants-UK-20260316.csv --dry-run

# Generate more leads (custom city/industry)
python3 find_businesses_uk.py --city London --industry plumbers --limit 50
```
